subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Kimiya 3
subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali-Qabli-Akbar! This servant in attendance presented thy letter and laid it before the Most Great Horizon. Know thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر مکتوبت را عبد حاضر حاضر نمود و در منظر اکبر معروض داشت معلوم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @alchemy; the elixir, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
